[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110110110 6
1 0000110111 5
2 0001101011 5
3 1010000000 2
4 1001100111 6
5 0110010111 6
6 0000000000 a
7 1011100100 5
